fault_hypothesis: The list comprehension on line 68 uses a greater-than-or-equal-to comparison ('>='), which incorrectly includes timestamps exactly at the cutoff boundary. The specification requires a strict comparison ('>') to exclude boundary values.

constraints.intent: All returned timestamps must be strictly greater than the cutoff value.
The cutoff value must be correctly computed as the start of the window.
The cutoff time must be strictly earlier than the 'now' time, assuming a positive window.
